inline_comments.message: The idea of having this fluent api is very nice. Nevertheless, IMHO using immutable collections with vavr api is not a good idea. MerkleTreeParser looks nice. But corresponding JsonObjectWrapper, despite having nice & short functions, is a mess. What do you think? Can we improve this or is it a dead end?

Totally agree - I'm probably quite fixed on current parsing 
algorithm, however I did not come up with any other that 
would not include radical changes to MerkleTree class.
Only improvement for solution proposed in this change set 
would be some further refactor of JOWrapper, but IMO it's not
worth the effort.
 
I find the master-branch solution easier to understand from 
algorithmic POV. Refactor can be re-thought in the future if
changes to this class arrive.
